title: Tovomitopsis myrcioides
taxonomy: Tovomitopsis myrcioides belongs to the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the St. Andrew's cross family. This family includes over 1,400 species of plants, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The genus Tovomitopsis is a part of the Clusiaceae family, with Tovomitopsis myrcioides being one of its species. Further classification of Tovomitopsis myrcioides would include its order, family, and kingdom, which would be Theales, Clusiaceae, and Plantae, respectively. The classification of plants is based on their morphological characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
